description: SFT of Cosmos-Reason2-8B on video QA (FSDP) + DEFT gap analysis of eval results (destructive)
rules: destructive: fine-tunes/trains a gated 8B model via FSDP — needs HF_TOKEN, docker + nvidia-container-toolkit, and multi-GPU (8x A100/H100 80GB recommended)
always start train specs from references/spec_template_train.yaml and apply overrides on the nested spec
keep train.train_policy.type = sft (dropping it flips cosmos-rl into RL mode); keep policy.model_max_length >= 40960
sample annotation JSON and require video_fps in each record before launching, else the SFT loader fails with 'video_fps'
gap analysis compares response vs gt by exact match after .lower().strip() — eval prompts must force short constrained answers
usage: Set RESULTS_DIR (cosmos-rl eval results.json dir), KPI_ANN_PATH (annotations JSON), KPI_MEDIA_PATH (media root). Output: gaps.parquet (FP/FN cases).
limitation: Gap analysis uses brittle exact match: full-sentence responses over-report mismatches, so eval prompt design must constrain answers. Training itself requires HF_TOKEN for the gated nvidia/Cosmos-Reason2-8B repo, docker + nvidia-container-toolkit, and multi-GPU FSDP hardware.
